ayat.arabic_uthmani: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ تَبَّتْ يَدَآ أَبِى لَهَبٍ وَتَبَّ
ayat.english: The power of Abu Lahab will perish, and he will perish.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ
ayat.english: His wealth and gains will not exempt him.
He will be plunged in flaming Fire,
Will have upon her neck a halter of palm-fibre.
